name: Aldeyra Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Aldeyra Therapeutics is a biotechnology company developing therapies for immune-mediated diseases. Its lead product candidate is reproxalap, a RASP modulator for dry eye disease and allergic conjunctivitis. It also develops ADX 2191 for primary vitreoretinal lymphoma and retinitis pigmentosa.

exposures.sentence: Our late-stage product candidates are reproxalap, a RASP modulator for the potential treatment of dry eye disease and allergic conjunctivitis, and ADX 2191, a novel formulation of intravitreal methotrexate for the potential treatment of primary vitreoretinal lymphoma and retinitis pigmentosa.

catalysts.event: FDA PDUFA date for reproxalap NDA resubmission
catalysts.sentence: On December 15, 2025, we announced that the FDA had requested submission of the field trial, triggering an extension of the PDUFA date to March 16, 2026.

catalysts.event: Expected commercial availability of reproxalap or other product candidates
catalysts.sentence: We do not expect reproxalap or any of our other product candidates to be commercially available, if at all, before at least the second quarter of 2026.
